DeskUIDocsComponentsLayout
GitHub

DeskUI

Professional UI components for business and enterprise mobile applications. Built for Kotlin Compose and SwiftUI.

Get StartedComponents

Business-First Design

Purpose-built for ERP, CRM, and accounting apps. Status badges, data tables, filter chips, form renderers — not generic consumer UI.

Cross-Platform Native

Jetpack Compose for Android, SwiftUI for iOS. Same design language, native performance. No compromise.

Fully Themeable

Every color, size, shape, and spacing value is configurable through DeskTheme. Adapt to any brand in minutes.

Production-Ready

Extracted from a real production app. Battle-tested components that handle edge cases, loading states, and offline mode.

Data-Dense Layouts

Optimized for screens that show lots of information. Compact typography, efficient spacing, scrollable tables.

Zero Dependencies

No third-party UI libraries. Just Compose Material3 primitives on Android and native SwiftUI on iOS.

Why not Material Design?

Material DesignDeskUI
Consumer-oriented, playfulBusiness-oriented, professional
Generic componentsDomain-specific: status badges, filter chips, data tables
One-size-fits-allOptimized for data-dense screens
Looks like "Android" on iOSNative feel on both platforms
Heavy theming to look professionalProfessional out of the box
